description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs named spec2.1, spec2.3, and spec2.4, each running in the default stage. Use the ruby:2.1 image for spec2.1, ruby:2.3 for spec2.3, and ruby:2.4 for spec2.4, and assign the Docker runner tag to all jobs. In each job execute the script: bundle install --path vendor --without production --jobs $(nproc) > /dev/null, then gem build lemme-pry.gemspec, then gem install *.gem, and finally echo 'puts "Hello AS " + ActiveSupport.version.to_s;exit' | lemme-pry activesupport '~> 4.0'. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
